description: Ground-truth evaluation dataset for gap analysis quality (min. 10 norm articles with expected outputs).

expected_gaps: Missing risk classification for deployed AI systems
expected_measures: Implement AI system risk classification process per Annex III

entries.input: Risk management system for high-risk AI
expected_gaps: No documented risk management system for AI operations
expected_measures: Establish continuous risk management lifecycle for high-risk AI systems

expected_gaps: Insufficient documentation for AI system deployers
expected_measures: Create deployer-facing documentation with usage instructions and limitations

entries.input: Actions to address risks and opportunities in AI management
expected_gaps: AI-specific risk assessment not integrated into ISMS
expected_measures: Extend ISMS risk assessment to cover AI-specific threats and opportunities

expected_gaps: No AI impact assessment process documented
expected_measures: Implement AI impact assessment process covering ethics, safety, and fairness

expected_gaps: Incident handling procedures incomplete for AI-related incidents
expected_measures: Extend incident response plan to cover AI system compromise scenarios

expected_gaps: No automated incident reporting within 24h window
expected_measures: Implement automated BSI notification pipeline with 24h/72h escalation

expected_gaps: DPIA not conducted for AI systems processing personal data
expected_measures: Conduct DPIA for all AI systems processing personal data per Art. 35

expected_gaps: No human-in-the-loop mechanism for automated decisions
expected_measures: Implement right to human review for AI-based profiling decisions

entries.input: Human oversight of high-risk AI systems
expected_gaps: Human oversight procedures not defined for high-risk systems
expected_measures: Define human oversight roles, escalation paths, and override procedures

expected_gaps: AI system performance monitoring not systematically tracked
expected_measures: Implement KPI framework for AI system performance and compliance monitoring

expected_gaps: Management body cybersecurity training not covering AI threats
expected_measures: Extend management cybersecurity training to include AI-specific threat vectors
